title: Fermented Irish Beef Burger
description: A unique twist on the classic burger featuring fermented Irish beef and a mediterranean-inspired twist. Serve with a side of fresh greens for a well-rounded meal.
instructions: Mix the minced beef and ferment-jang in a bowl until well combined.
Add the oregano, sea salt, and black pepper to the bowl and mix until just combined.
Divide the mixture into 4 equal portions and shape into patties.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat and add the patties, cooking for 4 minutes per side or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Meanwhile, toast the buns by grilling them in the pan for 1 minute or until lightly browned.
Assemble the burgers by spreading a dollop of yogurt sauce on the bottom bun, followed by a patty, a few slices of red onion, a handful of spinach, a few slices of cucumber, and finally the top bun.
